text.title: Java Spring Boot Enterprise Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to scaffold an enterprise Spring Boot 3 service end-to-end.

step.name: add-base-entity
step.action: Create `BaseEntity` with `@MappedSuperclass`, `@Id @GeneratedValue UUID id`, `@CreationTimestamp createdAt`, `@UpdateTimestamp updatedAt`, `@Version Long version`. Every domain entity extends it.
step.decision-gate: If an entity uses sequential `Long` id and is externally exposed, BLOCK per `base-entity-uuid-audit-version` rule.

step.name: add-record-dtos-and-mapstruct
step.action: Define request + response records per resource. Add MapStruct mapper per entity. Configure the annotation processor in `pom.xml`.

step.name: wire-service-readonly-default
step.action: Add `@Transactional(readOnly = true)` at the class level on every `@Service`. Override on write methods with `@Transactional`.
step.decision-gate: If any service lacks the class-level default, fail per `transactional-readonly-default` rule.

step.name: add-search-with-specifications
step.action: Repositories extend `JpaSpecificationExecutor<Entity>`. Build `Specification` factories per filter primitive (`hasStatus`, `nameLike`, `betweenDates`); compose with `Specification.where(...).and(...).or(...)`. Accept `Pageable`.
step.output: Search endpoint with type-safe filters + pagination

step.name: wire-actuator-problemdetail-security
step.action: Add Spring Boot Actuator + Micrometer Prometheus + `springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui`. Configure Spring Security to require auth on Actuator endpoints other than `/health`. Add one `@RestControllerAdvice` returning `ProblemDetail`.
step.output: Observability + auth + error contract in place
step.decision-gate: If Actuator endpoints are open to the public, BLOCK per `actuator-and-micrometer` rule.
